title: ETQ-303 v3: Exact 303-State Root-Indexed Event Protocol
description:
ETQ-303 v3.0.1 is a documentation-only terminology and exposition clarification of the exact finite event protocol archived as v3.0.0 at DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21455181. It explicitly declares complex scalars, finite-dimensional vector spaces, algebraic dimension, and tensor products over C.

The state space is H_303 = H_101 tensor C^3, with dim(H_303) = dim(H_101) dim(C^3) = 101 x 3 = 303. Here 303 is the algebraic dimension of the finite event/state vector space and the number of basis-indexed states; it is not a claim about physical spacetime dimensions. The C^3 factor is the declared independent three-state or qutrit-like protocol factor and implies no additional physical ontology.

The E8 root system is represented in an 8-dimensional Euclidean root space, D4 has algebraic rank 4, ETQ-101 contains 101 selected basis states, and ETQ-303 contains 303 tensor states. These mathematical dimensions and state counts do not by themselves imply a physical interpretation.

No mathematical construction, event ordering, deterministic artifact, fixture, implementation identity, protocol hash, software behavior, or scientific claim was changed. Root artifacts remain restricted to .json, .csv, and .mid, and the archived ETQ-101 v2.0.0 base release remains DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21432511.
notes: Documentation-only patch. ETQ-303 v3.0.0 remains immutable at Git tag v3.0.0, commit 6b55e51647226d1c248dc8d79f9ed9336241c2ac, and DOI 10.5281/zenodo.21455181.
